name: Cat Kids' Decorative Bed Pillow - Pillowfort™
description: Help your kid showcase the love of their favorite pet by accenting their space with the Cat Kids' Decorative Bed Pillow from Pillowfort™. This white bed pillow features a lumbar shape with cat eyes, whiskers, and nose detailing. Made of 100% faux-fur polyester fabric with 100% polyester filling, this plush pillow is super soft, cozy, and suitable for indoor and outdoor use.
